name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Will you join the Canary Club?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Every day, I wear a pin depicting a yellow canary in a cage. And to me, it's much more than an accessory. Miners used to bring canaries into the mines in order to check for dangerous levels of gas. If the canary died, they knew to get out of the mine. Back then, there were no formal protections for workers. So they banded together to fight for the right to collectively bargain. Years ago, I went to a Workers' Memorial Day rally in Lorain, Ohio, and a steelworker from Local 1104 gave me the canary pin. I've worn it ever since. It reminds me not just of the workers' rights movement, but of every hardworking man and woman in America, the families they support, and how important it is for me and for this grassroots team to keep fighting for each of those families. The canary pin is an important symbol for me -- and to this campaign. So today, we're announcing the Team Sherrod Canary Club. Our organization runs on one $26 average online contribution at a time. If you [**_match that by giving $26 today, you'll become a member of the Team Sherrod Canary Club._** ](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff812/4462dc26/6a88c810/200776ee/2191752184/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180724ccnd?refcode=sbe180724ccnd_m&amount=26")We'll even send you a free bumper sticker as a thank you. | [](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff812/4462dc26/6a88c810/200776ee/2191752184/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180724ccnd?refcode=sbe180724ccnd_m&amount=26")
---
These next four months will not be easy. But as long as we face them together, we will come out ahead in November -- and we'll be able to continue fighting for hardworking families in Ohio and across the country.
With gratitude,
Sherrod

|

| Activist - I want to tell you something that is somewhat hard to believe. And that is, when we talk to members of Congress, some of them don't understand just how pissed off people are about Trump's ridiculous military parade.

It's not just that this parade would be an international disgrace.

It's not just about making women and men who signed up to sacrifice everything march down the streets of our nation's capital to salute a chickenhawk.

It's about a president who has continually shown himself to have authoritarian tendencies.

**So, here 's what we need. Help us send a message to Congress that yes, you care deeply about this parade and you want action.**

[**Sign VoteVets Petition: Tell Congress that you are opposed to this military parade and you want to see action to stop it from happening.**](http://mail.democrats.com:81/CT00167001MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2018-07-25)

If Donald Trump really wanted to honor our military and veterans, he'd fill the nearly 50,000 vacancies at the VA. He'd bolster job training programs for veterans returning home. He'd protect public lands veterans use to "walk off the war." He'd stop trying to cut food assistance from veterans who need it.

This parade is a disgrace. Let's stop it.

All my best,

Jon Solz
Iraq War Veteran and Chairman
VoteVets

[](http://mail.democrats.com:81/CT00167002MTAwMzY3Mjc=.HTML?D=2018-07-25)

The White House • July 25, 2018
## **The Day Ahead**
President Donald J. Trump will meet with the President of the European Commission to discuss fairer trade deals that strengthen America’s farmers and manufacturers. **More****:**[Under President Trump, look at what’s happening in America’s heartland.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI1LjkyOTU5NDUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNS45Mjk1OTQ1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU4NTc1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/tax-cuts-jobs-optimism-look-whats-happening-americas-heartland/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)****
# **‘We don’t apologize for America anymore’**
**President Trump** promised to make honoring our veterans one of the top priorities of his Administration. Part of that promise means restoring American patriotism. “We don’t apologize for America anymore. We stand up for America,” the President told the Veterans of Foreign Wars national convention yesterday in Missouri. **“And we stand up for our National Anthem,”** the President said to a thundering ovation. **Another part of that promise** is making sure that our veterans receive the best healthcare in the world. That begins by holding the VA system accountable for misconduct and poor performance. Last June, President Trump signed the VA Accountability and Whistleblower Protection Act into law, making it easier to discipline bad actors, including senior executives. **The VA took more than 3,200 accountability actions** —which include removals, suspensions, and demotions—from the beginning of the Trump Administration through the end this May. All told, those actions resulted in more than 2,500 removals from the system. [See the 3 big ways President Trump is honoring our veterans’ service.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI1LjkyOTU5NDUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNS45Mjk1OTQ1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU4NTc1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trumps-administration-honoring-commitment-nations-veterans/)**** **Watch****:**[“We stand up for our National Anthem.”](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI1LjkyOTU5NDUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNS45Mjk1OTQ1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU4NTc1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1021829061927038976)****
# Religious persecution in Iran and China must end
**Around the world, religious minorities** are persecuted and stripped of human rights, Secretary of State Mike Pompeo wrote yesterday. “We need to hear the stories of those persecuted, tortured, falsely imprisoned, and killed for their faith. We can honor their sacrifices by preventing these atrocities from happening again,” he writes. **President Trump is taking action.** This week, the State Department is bringing together religious leaders, survivors of persecution, and delegations from foreign governments for the first-ever Ministerial to Advance Religious Freedom. Vice President Mike Pence and other senior Administration officials will be in attendance. **The goal is simple** : to promote the God-given human right to believe what you choose. [The persecution of Christians, Jews, and Sunni Muslims must end.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI1LjkyOTU5NDUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNS45Mjk1OTQ1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU4NTc1JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/religious-persecution-iran-china-must-end-now/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## Photo of the Day

clean_body: | | The White House • July 25, 2018 The Day Ahead President Donald J. Trump will meet with the President of the European Commission to discuss fairer trade deals that strengthen America’s farmers and manufacturers. More:** ‘We don’t apologize for America anymore’ President Trump promised to make honoring our veterans one of the top priorities of his Administration. Part of that promise means restoring American patriotism. “We don’t apologize for America anymore. We stand up for America,” the President told the Veterans of Foreign Wars national convention yesterday in Missouri. “And we stand up for our National Anthem,” the President said to a thundering ovation. Another part of that promise is making sure that our veterans receive the best healthcare in the world. That begins by holding the VA system accountable for misconduct and poor performance. Last June, President Trump signed the VA Accountability and Whistleblower Protection Act into law, making it easier to discipline bad actors, including senior executives. The VA took more than 3,200 accountability actions —which include removals, suspensions, and demotions—from the beginning of the Trump Administration through the end this May. All told, those actions resulted in more than 2,500 removals from the system. Watch**:** Religious persecution in Iran and China must end Around the world, religious minorities are persecuted and stripped of human rights, Secretary of State Mike Pompeo wrote yesterday. “We need to hear the stories of those persecuted, tortured, falsely imprisoned, and killed for their faith. We can honor their sacrifices by preventing these atrocities from happening again,” he writes. President Trump is taking action. This week, the State Department is bringing together religious leaders, survivors of persecution, and delegations from foreign governments for the first-ever Ministerial to Advance Religious Freedom. Vice President Mike Pence and other senior Administration officials will be in attendance. The goal is simple : to promote the God-given human right to believe what you choose. Friends,

I'm running for Governor of Florida for anyone who's ever been told they don't belong; for anyone who's ever been told they couldn't accomplish something because of where they came from; for anyone who's ever been told they weren't good enough because of who they were.

We deserve a seat at the table, too.

I'm ready to rebuild our state into one that works for every Floridian, regardless of where you come from or what you look like -- and this week, I'm proud to announce that my campaign is launching our first television ad, making it possible for us to share our campaign message with voters across the state!

I'm so proud of our grassroots campaign and this ad, but it's going to take a lot of resources to keep it on the air and reach the voters we need to win on August 28. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25 or more to keep our ad on the air? I'm a son of a school bus driver and a construction worker. I was the first in my family to graduate high school and college. I became the youngest ever City Commissioner. Then when I became Mayor, we beat the NRA twice.

Yet some still think it's impossible for me to become Governor because I'm not a millionaire. I'm ready to prove them wrong and show how the power of everyday people can drive change. We're going to make history, first in August and then in November, but I need your help to make it happen.

**[So please, chip in $25, or whatever you can afford, to help us keep our first TV ad on the air for as long as possible.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb37da/9e00690/598a17b2/2402f14b/75554542/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-tv-ad-email?gpsid=13_55_2258&refcode=em18_180725_TVAD1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180725_TVAD1_fnd_gq_act__AG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&noskip=true&utm_content=10+-+So+please+chip+in+25+or+whatever+you+can")**

body:
Hi friend,
I'm excited to announce that we don't just have lawn signs, but also bumper stickers and buttons. **[Click here now to reserve your Team Gina gear!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0fd/5e076a9e/5439d087/14426779/629035578/VEsH/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/s/store")**
**Rhode Island has come a long way in the last four years.** Back then, we had the worst unemployment rate in America, our schools were crumbling around our kids without a plan to fix them, and we were doing nothing about having the country's worst roads and bridges.
Today, Rhode Island's unemployment rate is the lowest it's been in more than 15 years. We are fixing our school buildings, our roads, and our bridges. **But all this progress is at stake: we need to re-elect Governor Raimondo, or risk losing it all.[Click here to show your support!](https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/m/1f41a0fd/5e076a9e/5439d087/14426779/629035578/VEsE/ "https://organizing.ginaraimondo.com/page/s/store")**
Thank you,
Gabe Amo

name: Travis Tazelaar
subject: Election year bait-and-switch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
Students deserve better.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ad6b/7ab0e2c4/7ffacb04/349be0d2/172082579/VEsH/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/debt-free-college?source=OHQ07258A") Friend, They say imitation is the sincerest form of flattery -- so Larry Hogan must really be sincere about his debt-free college plan, right? Wrong. Last week, Governor Hogan announced his "plan" to allow Maryland residents to deduct 100% of their interest paid on student loans from their income tax. It's probably no coincidence that Ben's debt-free college plan in Maryland is so popular right now, and that Governor Hogan will have to face tough questions about why tuition at Maryland public universities has risen more than 10% since he took office. Simply put, to borrow a term from my college years -- Hogan's plan is weaksauce. [**Larry Hogan needs to know that we see right through his plan for Maryland students -- add your name now to support Ben's comprehensive plan to end the student debt crisis.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ad6b/7ab0e2c4/7ffacb04/349be0d2/172082579/VEsE/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/debt-free-college?source=OHQ07258A") | [ADD YOUR NAME »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ad6b/7ab0e2c4/7ffacb04/349be0d2/172082579/VEsF/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/debt-free-college?source=OHQ07258A")
---
Ben's plan is simple but comprehensive. His plan tackles the structural problem of chronic under-investment in public higher education and uses savings from criminal justice reforms to ultimately move Maryland toward tuition-free community college, a comprehensive student debt restructuring program, and the long-term goal of a tuition-free public college and university system.
Larry Hogan, on the other hand, is doing a little bait-and-switch by dangling his "plan" in front of voters to distract them from the rising cost of tuition under his leadership. He's probably also hoping that voters forget how he tried to divert money from Maryland public universities to build a new jail.
When members of the Legislative Black Caucus here in Maryland urged Governor Hogan to prioritize educating students over incarcerating them, the governor compared the legislators to "rowdy college students on spring break."
[**Don't let Governor Hogan get away with election year gimmicks like this. Students need real solutions, and Ben has them -- add your name to support his plan to end student debt here in Maryland for good.**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37ad6b/7ab0e2c4/7ffacb04/349be0d2/172082579/VEsC/ "https://act.benjealous.com/page/s/debt-free-college?source=OHQ07258A")
Thanks,
Travis
Travis Tazelaar
Campaign Manager
Ben Jealous for Governor

subject: Republicans attacking Medicare
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
Friend, Medicare is under attack, and Debbie is fighting relentlessly to save this life-saving program.
|
---
| | Friend, **Medicare is under attack, and Debbie is fighting relentlessly to save this life-saving program.** Republicans in Washington want to slash Medicare and use the money to pay for their tax giveaway to billionaires. That's not right, and we need to keep the pressure on if we're going to defend a program that millions of seniors depend upon. [**Debbie is leading the charge against the Republican plan to cut Medicare -- sign our petition and help us get to 10,000 signatures.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f17/622b7b5b/1bef9c84/307b9b51/290147686/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180719ens") Seniors have spent a lifetime working hard and paying into Medicare. Now, Republicans want to undercut this vital program and send the money off to their rich friends. But with your help, we'll stop this scheme. Thanks, Team DWS P.S. It's Medicare's anniversary at the end of this month -- 53 years of giving seniors access to the care they need. [**Let 's make it a happy anniversary by protecting this program that so many Americans count on.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f17/622b7b5b/1bef9c84/307b9b51/290147686/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180719ens")

body:
Things are a little hectic in the Senate right now - but despite how busy they are, both of Virginia's Senators have written notes asking for your help. -----------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek,

Things are a little hectic in the Senate right now - but despite how busy they are, both of Virginia's Senators have written notes asking for your help.

Tim Kaine reached out to you before his very first debate of this election: | [**Now more than ever, we need to stand strong in our commitment to making Virginia and our country work for everyone.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1225/3e0906/6e8c8f9c/3e35dc8f/1588440697/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180725_1_FR_TEAM_Warner-emailed-you-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Now+more+than+ever+we+need+to+stand+stro&utm_campaign=20180725_1_FR_TEAM_Warner-emailed-you-LDND&source=20180725_1_FR_TEAM_Warner-emailed-you-LDND")

body:

| | | Hi there - Election results came in late, so I wanted to make sure you saw Stacey's note. Brian Kemp is well-funded and has the Republican establishment supporting him 100%. But we can beat him if we all stand together. Our team has set an ambitious 72-hour fundraising goal to show Brian Kemp that we are ready to turn Georgia blue. Chip in here: **[https://secure.staceyabrams.com/BeatBrianKemp](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa919/34a064cc/bd50017/70eb1eb/15369030/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNzI1MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-opponent?refcode=IE072518-full")** Let's do this. Lauren Groh-Wargo
Campaign Manager
_\---original message---_
Dear friends - It's official: Moments ago, Georgia Republicans chose Brian Kemp to be their nominee for governor. And tomorrow, Republicans will coalesce around him and pour millions of dollars into his campaign because they know we have the numbers and grassroots support to win in November. **[Will you chip in $3 or more right now to help us fight back?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa919/34a064cc/bd50017/70eb1eb/15369030/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNzI1MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-opponent?refcode=IE072518-full")** If you're not familiar with Republican Brian Kemp, you will be soon. For now, know this: Kemp is wrong for Georgia families. I'm not going to sugarcoat it: Turning Georgia blue in only 3 months won't be easy, especially against a well-funded opponent like Kemp. But if our people-powered campaign steps up right now, if we put in the work, we can win. So I'm asking: **[Will you contribute to our movement to transform Georgia? Every dollar helps us reach out to more voters.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa919/34a064cc/bd50017/70eb1eb/15369030/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNzI1MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-opponent?refcode=IE072518-full")** We've been building for this moment - are you with us? Thank you for your support, Stacey Abrams

Team -- I will always put Pennsylvania families first. Not corporations. Not the 1%. The people who work hard every day to put food on the table and a roof over their loved ones' heads.

That's why President Trump and Vice President Pence attacked me on Monday. The Trump administration is pretty upset with me -- I've blocked repeated attempts to repeal the ACA, I voted against their corporate tax cut and I've refused to support their Supreme Court nominee. I've taken these stands because the Trump administration continues to value corporations over the middle-class, and that's just wrong.

**_[Can you chip in $5 to help me fight back against these smears from the Trump administration?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180725_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_**

Ever since I called out their Supreme Court nominee selection process for what it was -- a corrupt bargain with corporate special interests -- Republicans have really stepped up their attacks. It's not just VP Pence: the Koch brothers are running ads against me and Mitch McConnell's campaign arm has twisted my words. It's only a matter of time before the President himself weighs in, and we need to be ready when that happens.

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Farmers Need a Fighter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
Yesterday, the Trump administration announced plans to send $12 billion to farmers hurt by the administration's tariffs. **This taxpayer-funded bailout only shows how much these tariffs and ill-advised trade wars are crushing our already precarious farm economy.** And where will this $12 billion come from? Republicans often ask for offsets for spending, so what $12 billion will they be cutting? Social Security? Medicare?
For four straight years our farmers have struggled to make a profit, and that was even before Trump’s tariff trade war. Steve King, who sits on the U.S. House Committee on Agriculture, has been in a position to propose legislation that would help our struggling farm community. **Instead, he regularly skips meetings and provides no leadership and no real solutions.**
I spend a lot of time talking to farmers across this district, and they’re telling me they’re fed up with Washington D.C. playing games with their livelihoods. Despite being in Congress for 16 years in one of the biggest agricultural states in the country, **Steve King was not even invited to be a member of the farm bill conference committee!**
Farming is in my blood and it’s a big part of who I am and what I’m fighting for. I’m a fifth-generation Iowan, but the first generation to grow up in town. My family still owns a farm just outside Lake Mills, and just before my grandmother (my inspiration) passed away, she told me that she wanted me to “take care of our family farm.”
Beating Steve King, and fighting for all of the farmers of this district is my way of fulfilling my grandmother’s wish. As many have said before, “Iowa feeds and fuels the world.” Our farmers have done so much to help build this great nation, and **I view it as our responsibility to be there when they need us to stand for them.**
If elected to Congress, I will be a voice that stands up for our farmers, our communities, and our district, regardless of political party.

body:
We wanted to make sure you had the chance to voice your opinion on a carbon tax, and congressional climate deniers refusing to protect our environment.

[**Make sure you add your name to stand with Dan against climate change inaction -> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/8kQHEpIb5wYKoFBJswJuPL2IoAYfg58QkrEaQtIHNV0=/cpbVFasLwcSthUSYAJeQhpkx_iavE5s-Gs3JCEA2KjE=)

> [](https://act.myngp.com/el/8kQHEpIb5wYKoFBJswJuPL2IoAYfg58QkrEaQtIHNV0=/VuAbkOCgTWpiWojAJFOmpUNpEe8u0P_am3we6RikQyw=)
>
> Peter,
>
> Last week, some Republican colleagues of mine in the House voted on a resolution to condemn any type of tax on carbon, in any form, across the board. We're not going to be able to combat climate change with this sort of short-sightedness.
>
> A carbon tax is a fee imposed on the burning of carbon-based fuels, like coal, oil, and gas. It is an important tool to deter carbon-intensive consumption and pay for the damage done to the environment.
>
> Protecting our world should not be a partisan issue, and effective, innovative tools like a carbon tax should not receive blanket rejection for no good reason.
>
> [**Add your name if you agree that companies that destroy the earth should pay their fair share. Demand that the House GOP revoke their resolution immediately -> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/8kQHEpIb5wYKoFBJswJuPL2IoAYfg58QkrEaQtIHNV0=/5efOYztOxd-6T8aq4dsDT_yNvbvat7GeRdoyKAyvHJo=)

> This resolution from House Republicans was not only meaningless, but is a knee jerk reaction from many on the right to disregard the dangers of man-made climate change. In fact, this resolution had the express support of several high profile climate change deniers.
>
> Economists on both sides of the political spectrum agree that a carbon tax is one of the best tools we have to combat climate change using the innovation of the free market.
>
> There are many on the right who believe that a carbon tax will not only reduce emissions but also benefit the economy. [**Join me if you agree that big polluters should be held accountable for the environmental degradation they cause ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8kQHEpIb5wYKoFBJswJuPL2IoAYfg58QkrEaQtIHNV0=/5efOYztOxd-6T8aq4dsDT_yNvbvat7GeRdoyKAyvHJo=)

subject: I am counting on you to help elect women this year, Peter

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4df1/24c69fd9/27617309c/1885993d/544308646/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES60N_digital_email_20180725_ELPlans_inact&source=WQEFES60N_digital_email_20180725_ELPlans_inact")
---

Peter,

As of this weekend, we will be 100 days out from what may be the most consequential election of our lifetimes, and we have been hard at work getting ready for it.

You may have heard that we had to knock down a wall in our office earlier this year to make space for more staff. I thought I'd give you a little peek into what all those staffers have been up to.

_Finding, Training, & Recruiting Women_

Our training team has been traveling all over the country training thousands of pro-choice Democratic women to run for office. We've been to over 30 cities and counting so far! Many of these women, like Lucy McBath (GA-06) and Gina Ortiz Jones (TX-23), have gone on to run for office this cycle. We've also been hard at work launching resources to support the 40,000 women who have reached out to us about running for office -- including the EMILY's List Training Center, which brings all of our best practices and training materials online, and our Run to Win Facebook group. We're not just focused on winning in 2018; we're building the pipeline so every election year is the year of the woman.

_Endorsing & Advising Candidates_

This year, we've endorsed a record number of women at all levels, including 12 women for the Senate and 57 women for the House. That means we can flip the Senate AND House with just pro-choice Democratic women. And we can more than quintuple the number of Democratic women governors AND elect hundreds more women to state and local office.

This is all possible because of our incredible campaigns team -- the state and local team alone has tripled in size this year -- which helps women run for office and win. An EMILY's List endorsement comes with more than just a line of text for your website. Our political team works in close partnership with our endorsed candidates on the ground, advising and helping them run strong campaigns and navigate the challenges of their specific races.

_Uplifting Our Candidates_

Our communications team works nonstop to tell reporters about the amazing women we've endorsed -- their hopes, dreams, and passion for serving their communities. Their work allows EMILY's List candidates at all levels to expand their profiles, which can attract statewide or even nationwide attention, bringing in more money, volunteers, and resources. They also work directly with candidates, giving them advice about how best to tell their own stories. And they work to tell your story; the story of thousands of women and men standing up for change across the country.

Our digital team works to meet you where you are. They helped me send this email, and they keep you up to date on all of the awesome women we've endorsed on Twitter, Facebook, Tumblr, Instagram, and via our brand-new texting program.

_Making Everything Happen_

None of this could happen without the money raised by our development and digital teams. That's where you come in, too. We couldn't do any of the work listed above without YOUR help.

**Together,_we can flip the Senate and take back the House and elect nine more governors and flip state legislative chambers with pro-choice Democratic women._**

We only have a few months left until the election.

**Donate $3 today to keep up the momentum and help elect a record number of pro-choice Democratic women this year:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Record-Breaking-Year](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4df1/24c69fd9/27617309c/1885993e/544308646/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180725_email_ELPlans?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgRecordBreakingYe&utm_campaign=WQEFES60N_digital_email_20180725_ELPlans_inact&source=WQEFES60N_digital_email_20180725_ELPlans_inact")**

Thank you,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

You may have heard that we had to knock down a wall in our office earlier this year to make space for more staff. I thought I'd give you a little peek into what all those staffers have been up to. Finding, Training, & Recruiting Women Our training team has been traveling all over the country training thousands of pro-choice Democratic women to run for office. We've been to over 30 cities and counting so far! Many of these women, like Lucy McBath (GA-06) and Gina Ortiz Jones (TX-23), have gone on to run for office this cycle. We've also been hard at work launching resources to support the 40,000 women who have reached out to us about running for office -- including the EMILY's List Training Center, which brings all of our best practices and training materials online, and our Run to Win Facebook group. We're not just focused on winning in 2018; we're building the pipeline so every election year is the year of the woman. Endorsing & Advising Candidates This year, we've endorsed a record number of women at all levels, including 12 women for the Senate and 57 women for the House. That means we can flip the Senate AND House with just pro-choice Democratic women. And we can more than quintuple the number of Democratic women governors AND elect hundreds more women to state and local office. This is all possible because of our incredible campaigns team -- the state and local team alone has tripled in size this year -- which helps women run for office and win. An EMILY's List endorsement comes with more than just a line of text for your website. Our political team works in close partnership with our endorsed candidates on the ground, advising and helping them run strong campaigns and navigate the challenges of their specific races. Uplifting Our Candidates Our communications team works nonstop to tell reporters about the amazing women we've endorsed -- their hopes, dreams, and passion for serving their communities. Their work allows EMILY's List candidates at all levels to expand their profiles, which can attract statewide or even nationwide attention, bringing in more money, volunteers, and resources. They also work directly with candidates, giving them advice about how best to tell their own stories. And they work to tell your story; the story of thousands of women and men standing up for change across the country. Our digital team works to meet you where you are. They helped me send this email, and they keep you up to date on all of the awesome women we've endorsed on Twitter, Facebook, Tumblr, Instagram, and via our brand-new texting program. Making Everything Happen None of this could happen without the money raised by our development and digital teams. That's where you come in, too. We couldn't do any of the work listed above without YOUR help. Together,we can flip the Senate and take back the House and elect nine more governors and flip state legislative chambers with pro-choice Democratic women. We only have a few months left until the election. name: Aisling Kerins, Team Inslee
subject: We're way ahead of the curve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
If you like what we've been doing here in Washington, we need you to step up now.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78bfa/2f5ea88d/77627b3b/2cbc0627/2071978798/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-25_july-eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-07-25_july-eom-1&utm_campaign=july-eom-1&utm_medium=ema") Dear Friend, It's no secret that Washington state is way ahead of the curve on pretty much every major progressive issue of our time. We made marriage equality a reality years before the Supreme Court made it legal across the country. We've taken huge steps to reform our criminal justice system, including legalizing marijuana. And we've sent a loud and clear message that our doors are open to refugees and new Americans -- no matter what backwards policy President Trump decides to push. Governor Inslee's leadership is proving how incredibly successful a progressive path forward can be -- that's why we're the #1 state economy in the country. And he's standing up to Trump to protect our shared values -- starting by looking Donald Trump in the face and calling him out for tweeting instead of leading when it comes to gun violence and our kids' safety. We're showing leadership where D.C. won't, modeling for the country what a progressive government can achieve. If you're like me, and you know how important it is to show what a progressive agenda in the states can achieve, I need you to step up now. We've got an official end-of-month deadline coming up and we need to grow Governor Inslee's progressive power in the face of Trump's dangerous rhetoric. [**Can you chip in now before July's end-of-month deadline to make sure we're growing our progressive movement?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78bfa/2f5ea88d/77627b3b/2cbc0627/2071978798/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-25_july-eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-07-25_july-eom-1&utm_campaign=july-eom-1&utm_medium=ema") Thanks, Aisling Kerins | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78bfa/2f5ea88d/77627b3b/2cbc0627/2071978798/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/july-deadline-inslee?utm_source=ema_2018-07-25_july-eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-07-25_july-eom-1&utm_campaign=july-eom-1&utm_medium=ema")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stacey Abrams for Governor
body:
Meet Brian Kemp: He opposes Medicaid expansion and a woman's right to choose. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa918/34a064cc/bd78c6e/70eaf21/3105556305/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friends - We have our official Republican opponent. Meet Brian Kemp: He failed Georgians in so many ways as Secretary of State, and now he wants a promotion to governor. As secretary, he took over $300,000 from people and industries he was supposed to be regulating. _And then he gave himself a raise._ He opposes Medicaid expansion and a woman's right to choose, but fully supports campus carry and cutting environmental regulations. His policies and fear mongering have earned him the endorsement of Donald Trump. **Brian Kemp will put politics, self-interest, and his powerful friends above Georgia families. We know it 's true because he's already done it.** **[Donate to Stacey Abrams' campaign for governor right now to help us beat him.](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa918/34a064cc/bd78c6e/70eaf2e/3105556305/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNzI1MTgtMi1hIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-opponent?refcode=IE072518-2-a")** While Kemp spends the next 103 days attacking our movement, Stacey will continue to travel the state - as she has been doing since this election began - talking to families about her vision for Georgia. But that's going to take resources. name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Today's decision re: Trump's emoluments
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
We can take on the beating heart of Trump's corruption -- The Trump Organization.
#

Peter -
There was a watershed moment in the emoluments lawsuit against Donald Trump today. A federal judge ruled that the case may proceed despite the president's objections.
The potential implications of this case are unprecedented. This could force Trump to shut down his hotel in DC, divest from his businesses and even pull the Trump Organization's books into the public record.
I was part of the team that created the legal strategy in the original emoluments lawsuit against Donald Trump -- three days into his presidency. I also pushed the former New York Attorney General to join this case with the Maryland and DC AGs. He failed to act.
But if I am your next Attorney General, New York will join this fight. Maryland and DC can only go after the businesses in their jurisdictions, but if New York joins this suit, **we can take on the beating heart of Trump 's corruption -- The Trump Organization.**
The next New York Attorney General must be a check on the president's corruption and lawlessness. I will do just that, but I need your help to do it:
**[Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign today? There are powerful people and wealthy interests likely to spend whatever it takes to stop us because they're afraid of an independent AG. With your help, we can beat them.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e98/6e822e2f/1a73266e/41724876/3121896216/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MjUtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-july?refcode=em180725-full")**
This type of litigation is exactly what you can count on in an Attorney General Teachout administration. I have spent the better part of my adult life studying and writing about corruption, and yes, the emoluments clause.
In today's opinion, the judge cited my research four times. Most notably by adopting that there is an anti-corruption principle embedded in the Constitution: Corruption does not include only blatant bribes.
Peter, I have been arguing this principle for nine years. It is clear that, in this moment in our history, it has never been more important to have an independent Attorney General who will focus on rooting out corruption wherever it may exist -- from Albany to Wall Street to the presidency.
I am ready to lead that fight, but I cannot do it alone.
**[Your $3 donation matters because it is people like you who power our campaign-- not corporations or big monied interests. This is important.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e98/6e822e2f/1a73266e/41724876/3121896216/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MjUtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-july?refcode=em180725-full")**
The only way we will get justice for working people is if we're in this together, so thank you for your support.
Best,
Zephyr

| | Friends,

Democrat Joe Donnelly is feeling the pressure this week.

**That's because U.S. Senate candidate Mike Braun is helping Hoosiers keep a careful eye on Democrat Donnelly's actions in Washington, and letting us know when they don't match what he's telling us here at home!**

We saw it just a few weeks ago. When Democrat Donnelly told his fellow Democrats that he was the deciding vote against last year's attempt to repeal Obamacare once and for all, Mike Braun made sure Hoosiers heard Donnelly's words loud and clear.

---
| [HELP KEEP DEMOCRAT DONNELLY ACCOUNTABLE!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4409072dd1&e=1acd9bb3d6 "HELP KEEP DEMOCRAT DONNELLY ACCOUNTABLE!")
---
| And this week, _**Mike Braun led the charge again**_ , **this time putting the pressure on Democrat Donnelly to take the time to actually meet with President Donald Trump's nominee to the U.S. Supreme Court, Judge Brett Kavanaugh**. It took two weeks (and a lot of pressure), but Democrat Donnelly finally put a meeting with Judge Kavanaugh on his schedule.

Mike Braun put it perfectly:

_"Democrat Senator Donnelly had to decide if he would stand with liberals in Washington, or meet with President Trump’s highly qualified nominee, and I’m glad he will at least meet with Judge Kavanaugh. While I strongly support this nomination, I have no doubt Donnelly will wait until the liberal wing of his party gives him permission to support Judge Kavanaugh.”_

Judge Kavanaugh is the perfect choice for the Supreme Court. He believes in interpreting the Constitution as it's written, and his reputation is impeccable.

_**Mike Braun is leading in this race...both in the narrative, and the polls. What we're doing is working. But that's where you come in.**_

Would you be willing [to chip in $25, $50, $100, $250 or more](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5d4af30503&e=1acd9bb3d6) to help us share Mike Braun's message and to continue to keep the pressure on Democrat Donnelly?

With important votes on the Supreme Court and beyond coming up, it's critical that we continue to keep Democrat Donnelly accountable, and we can only do it with your help.

Mike Braun is winning. But it's up to us to make sure that come November, he's the first to cross the finish line.

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

clean_body: Democrat Joe Donnelly is feeling the pressure this week.That's because U.S. Senate candidate Mike Braun is helping Hoosiers keep a careful eye on... | | | | | | | | | Friends, Democrat Joe Donnelly is feeling the pressure this week. That's because U.S. Senate candidate Mike Braun is helping Hoosiers keep a careful eye on Democrat Donnelly's actions in Washington, and letting us know when they don't match what he's telling us here at home! We saw it just a few weeks ago. When Democrat Donnelly told his fellow Democrats that he was the deciding vote against last year's attempt to repeal Obamacare once and for all, Mike Braun made sure Hoosiers heard Donnelly's words loud and clear. | "HELP KEEP DEMOCRAT DONNELLY ACCOUNTABLE!" | And this week, Mike Braun led the charge again , this time putting the pressure on Democrat Donnelly to take the time to actually meet with President Donald Trump's nominee to the U.S. Supreme Court, Judge Brett Kavanaugh. It took two weeks (and a lot of pressure), but Democrat Donnelly finally put a meeting with Judge Kavanaugh on his schedule. Mike Braun put it perfectly: "Democrat Senator Donnelly had to decide if he would stand with liberals in Washington, or meet with President Trump’s highly qualified nominee, and I’m glad he will at least meet with Judge Kavanaugh. While I strongly support this nomination, I have no doubt Donnelly will wait until the liberal wing of his party gives him permission to support Judge Kavanaugh.” Judge Kavanaugh is the perfect choice for the Supreme Court. He believes in interpreting the Constitution as it's written, and his reputation is impeccable. Mike Braun is leading in this race...both in the narrative, and the polls. What we're doing is working. But that's where you come in. Would you be willing to help us share Mike Braun's message and to continue to keep the pressure on Democrat Donnelly? With important votes on the Supreme Court and beyond coming up, it's critical that we continue to keep Democrat Donnelly accountable, and we can only do it with your help. Mike Braun is winning. But it's up to us to make sure that come November, he's the first to cross the finish line. Kyle Hupfer Chairman, Indiana Republican Party | "LET'S DEFEAT DEMOCRAT JOE DONNELLY!
